---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in one of the projects
title: "[BUG] Project NN - Short description"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Project

Which project number and name? (e.g., "02 - File Hash Calculator")

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Commands to reproduce the issue
python -m src.project_XX --flag value
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error traceback if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: Kali Linux (version?)
- Python: `python3 --version`
- Package versions: `pip freeze`

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
